# Taylor (NotGreg) — February 17, 2026

**Type:** External / Exploratory Relationship
**Participants:** Dax, Taylor
**How Taylor found DD:** Searched Discord for a server tag he liked — found "dgen," caught onto the branding, and cold DM'd Dax

---

## Overview

Taylor is a 33-year-old self-employed payment processor/banker who randomly DM'd Dax after liking DD's branding. The call was exploratory — Taylor introduced himself, explained his various business ventures, and floated several potential ways to work together. Dax gave Taylor premium access during the call. The conversation ended with both agreeing to follow up.

---

## What Was Discussed

**Taylor's background:**
- Self-employed payment processor — replaces Stripe with NMI/Authorized.net for businesses, earns lifetime residuals per account
- Private bookmaker with close friends (Venmo-based, small scale)
- Building a Discord for live music/concerts/art (early stages)
- Has a sportsbook app in beta
- Has an in-house software development team
- Sister (19) is his business partner and virtual assistant

**DD context Dax shared:**
- Junior at Syracuse, running DD on the side plus a fintech internship
- ~8,000 members, ~50 premium, never exceeded 150 premium paying members
- Pricing at $15/month, raising to $50/month within a week or two
- 80% of growth organic — Fliff Discord SEO + Discord listing sites (Discadia, Discord.me, Hive Index)
- Churn problem: Fliff demographic (18-year-olds) lost their money or stopped using Discord
- EV alert integration from OddsJam — ~2,000 alerts/day, filtering down to 5–10/sport
- Previous staff issues: had 10–12, stripped to 6; commission-only model, not converting

**Taylor's pitches (in order):**
1. Bookie/student portfolio — set Dax up with lines of credit to manage bets for people he trusts
2. Payment processing referrals — Dax introduces business owners, Taylor closes, Dax earns lifetime residuals
3. Stripe → NMI/Authorized.net replacement for DD's payment gateway
4. Live music Discord thread — Taylor's upcoming concert app could post announcements into DD
5. Discord building exchange — Taylor learns how to structure/monetize his Discord; Dax teaches; Taylor gives free business/banking counsel in return

**Dax's responses:**
- Bookmaking: declined, shared brief history of why he stopped (friends + payment issues + never wanted to do it)
- Payment processing referrals: deferred — interested but out of time, revisit later
- Stripe switch: not Dax's call — custom APIs, needs developer; not likely actionable
- Live music thread: no action, exploratory only
- Discord exchange: open to it, easy enough to do

**End of call:**
Dax gave Taylor premium access. Taylor to send company links/socials for background research. Both agreed to reconnect — Dax available most evenings 7–11pm, Taylor will follow up Thursday or Friday.

---

## Dax's Post-Call Notes (from transcript)

- Interested in more about POS referral but too much friction to switch off Stripe — probably not
- Discord help: yes, willing, easy to do — but Taylor has to show there's an actual community worth building for first
- Not taking action on bookmaking
- Priority action: research Taylor's credibility before going further
